ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft that made the flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the flight */,
  "departure_location" TEXT /* Departure location of the flight */,
  "arrival_location" TEXT /* Arrival location of the flight */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight */,
  "flight_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered by the flight in kilometers */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Amount of fuel consumed during the flight in liters */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot assigned to the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of the aircraft */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft manufacturer */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight during which the data was collected */,
  "time_utc" REAL /* Time at which the data was collected in UTC */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure reading */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading */,
  "airspeed" REAL /* Airspeed reading */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll angle */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch angle */,
  "fuel_level" REAL /* Fuel level in the aircraft at the time of data collection */,
  "engine_status" TEXT /* Status of the engine */,
  "cabin_pressure" REAL /* Pressure inside the cabin */,
  "cabin_temperature" REAL /* Temperature inside the cabin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location data point */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight during which the data was collected */,
  "time_utc" REAL /* Time at which the data was collected in UTC */,
  "g_lat" REAL /* Geodetic latitude */,
  "g_long" REAL /* Geodetic longitude */,
  "g_alt" REAL /* Geodetic altitude */,
  "speed_over_ground" REAL /* Speed of the aircraft over the ground in knots */,
  "track_angle" REAL /* Track angle of the aircraft in degrees */,
  "vertical_speed" REAL /* Vertical speed of the aircraft in feet per minute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_locations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pilot, engineer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to a roles table for more detailed role management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who defined the query */,
  "query_name" TEXT /* Name of the query */,
  "query_definition" TEXT /* Definition of the query */,
  "last_run_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the query was run */,
  "result_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the last run of the query */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who defined the alert */,
  "alert_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert */,
  "alert_definition" TEXT /* Definition of the alert */,
  "last_triggered_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "trigger_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the alert has been triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pilots" (
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pilot */,
  "pilot_name" TEXT /* Name of the pilot */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the pilot */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of flying experience */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pilot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
